title: Ensure root account access is controlled

prose.en: Ensure root account access is controlled

description.en: There are a number of methods to access the root account directly. Without a password set any user would be able to gain access and thus control over the entire system.

rationale.en: Access to `root` should be secured at all times.

audit.en:
Run the following command to set a password for the `root` user:  

**\- OR \-**  

Run the following command to lock the `root` user account:  

Impact:  

If there are any automated processes that relies on access to the root account without authentication, they will fail after remediation.

```
# usermod -L root
```

```
# passwd root
```

remediation.en:
Run the following command to set a password for the `root` user:  

**\- OR \-**  

Run the following command to lock the `root` user account:  

Impact:  

If there are any automated processes that relies on access to the root account without authentication, they will fail after remediation.

```
# usermod -L root
```

```
# passwd root
```
